case_title: ANGELICA R JUNIO ET AL VS. RICHARD STEPHEN BRANDIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN STATES PREFERRED INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO AMERICAN STATES PREFERRED INSURANCE COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-15-2015 AT 3:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNIO, ANGELICA R JUNIO, ARSENIO A AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN STATES PREFERRED INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNIO, ANGELICA R JUNIO, ARSENIO A AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDIS, RICHARD STEPHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN STATES ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY KEN WONG--ADJUSTER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-14-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDIS, RICHARD STEPHEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNIO, ANGELICA R JUNIO, ARSENIO A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRANDIS, RICHARD STEPHEN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, AMERICAN STATES PREFERRED INSURANCE COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY JUNIO, ANGELICA R JUNIO, ARSENIO A AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDIS, RICHARD STEPHEN AMERICAN STATES PREFERRED INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
